calculation_basis: Gap register row; no R2 value is calculated without fitted training-row predictions.
notes: Training-fit R2 is not comparable to forecast R2. High paper-style R2 usually measures in-sample fit, while forecast R2 measures out-of-sample explanatory power after final model composition.
gap_detail: PED inner HPO weights and nested replay are available where present, but fitted inner-component training rows were not retained.

calculation_basis: PED inner-HPO audit gap carried forward from the reproducibility pack.
notes: Nested replay and weights do not prove training-fit R2 without fitted training rows.
